description: ERC-7730 Translation File Schema. A translation file provides a flat map of English source strings to translated strings for a specific locale. It is referenced from the '$i18n' field of a parent ERC-7730 document.

$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The schema this translation file conforms to.

$locale.title: Locale
$locale.description: The BCP-47 language tag for this translation (e.g. 'fr', 'zh-Hans', 'pt-BR'). MUST match the key used in the parent document's '$i18n' map.

translations.title: Translations
translations.description: Flat map from English source string as it appears in the parent ERC-7730 document to the translated string in the target locale. Keys are exact English strings; values are the corresponding translations. Placeholders in interpolatedIntent strings (e.g. '{value}', '{to}') MUST be preserved verbatim in translations. Strings absent from this map fall back to the English original.
